existing_features.title: Remove the Next button from the test interface so students no longer need to press it to move to the next question
Display all test questions in a continuous vertical row, one after another, instead of showing one question at a time
Maintain the reading test two-panel layout with passage on the left and all questions displayed vertically on the right panel
Update progress tracking and navigation to work with the continuous question display instead of current question index

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove next button requirement, display questions in continuous vertical row
